overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a deer running through tall grass toward a river, followed by a smooth camera movement through the water and along rocky riverbanks in a mountainous forest environment. The footage features high-quality natural lighting, detailed vegetation, and snow-capped mountains in the distance.

events.description: deer begins running through tall grass toward the river
camera moves from grass into the river water

agents.ego_description: moving through tall grass approaching the riverbank, observing the deer ahead

notable_agents.action: deer running through the grass toward the river, then moving right and exiting frame

entered.detail: dense green grass covering the ground in the foreground
calm river with reflective surface in the distance
tall coniferous trees lining the left riverbank
tall coniferous trees lining the right riverbank
distant mountain peak with snow visible above the treeline
rocky outcrop visible through the trees on the left side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a grassy meadow by a river, with a deer running through the tall grass toward the water. The camera follows through the dense vegetation as it approaches the riverbank, with pine forests and a distant snow-capped mountain visible in the background under a clear blue sky.

events.description: camera enters deeper water and begins moving downstream with the current
passing large submerged rocks and boulders in the river

agents.ego_description: wading through the river water, moving steadily downstream between rocky banks

entered.detail: grassy and rocky shoreline on the left side of the river
grassy and rocky shoreline on the right side of the river
rocks visible beneath the clear water surface
prominent boulder rising from the water in the river center

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the river, wading through clear water with submerged rocks visible below the surface. The scene follows the river downstream between forested banks, with the water reflecting the sky and surrounding coniferous trees as it flows gently through the valley.

events.description: approaching rocky shore with large fallen log and stone cairn
navigating around large boulders on the right riverbank

agents.ego_description: moving along the rocky riverbank, passing a large fallen log and navigating around boulders

entered.detail: gravel and stone shoreline with pebbles and rocks
large decaying tree trunk lying on the shore with a small stone cairn on top
massive gray rock formation along the riverbank
grassy area visible on the distant left bank

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the river past a rocky shoreline featuring a prominent fallen log with a stone cairn and large boulders. The camera moves along the water's edge where gravel banks meet the forest, with the river flowing calmly alongside and the terrain becoming more rocky and uneven.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in a lush meadow and transitions into a steady glide along a rocky river valley. It begins by tracking a deer running through tall grass toward the water, with pine forests and a distant snow-capped mountain framing the horizon under a clear blue sky. As the camera reaches the riverbank, it moves directly into the clear water, wading downstream where submerged rocks are visible beneath the surface and the current reflects the surrounding coniferous trees. The scene then shifts toward the river's edge, passing a prominent fallen log topped with a stone cairn and large boulders. Finally, the camera glides along the gravel banks where the terrain becomes increasingly rocky and uneven as the river flows calmly beside the forest.
